final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey), reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style, featuring the iconic rooftop embrace between Zhi Zunbao and Zixia with Niu Mowang and Tang Seng standing in the distance, with film grain texture.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster aesthetic with the romantic melancholy and saturated film grain of Wong Kar-wai's visual world
Composition: the embracing couple as the emotional center, two distant figures anchoring the background depth, generous negative space for title treatment
Subject: Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in their legendary rooftop embrace, Niu Mowang and Tang Seng standing apart in the far distance as witnesses
Scene/backdrop: ancient city wall at dusk, the sky bleeding from amber into deep violet
Lighting/mood: the golden hour of memory, tender and bittersweet, light catching the folds of flowing robes
Color palette: saturated amber and violet in conversation, the warmth of nostalgia against the cool promise of separation
Materials/textures: 35mm film grain, the slight softness of projected celluloid, brushed silk of period costumes
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: 
Avoid: modern digital sharpness, contemporary design aesthetics, Western fantasy poster clichés
